title: Artifacts and Relics
description: Adds some unique items which gives player some passive buffs and debuffs
body:
# Artifacts & Relics

A Minecraft Fabric mod that adds 26 unique artifacts across 3 tiers. Each artifact provides special abilities when equipped in dedicated artifact slots.

**Minecraft Version:** 1.21.4  
**Mod Loader:** Fabric  
**Dependencies:** Fabric API

---

## How to Use

Press **E** to open your inventory. Hover over armor slots or the offhand slot to reveal artifact slots. Click to equip/unequip artifacts.

**Artifact Slots:**
- Helmet slot
- Chestplate slot
- Leggings slot
- Boots slot
- Left Hand slot
- Right Hand slot

---

## Tier 1 Artifacts

1) **Helm of Putrid**(helmet artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Putrid Helm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6e963196e1a64f951a45c7f3b0cdd7aaa3d9e27_0.webp)

Obtained by killing a zombie.
Player suffers from no hunger status after eating rotten flesh when equipped.

</details>

2) **Carcassbound Cuirass**(chestplate artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![CarcassboundCuirass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cbd81f9a4e38007623d87819be0837700ea3402.jpeg)

Obtained by killing a spider.
Reduces damage received by 15%, but increases damage received from fire by 15%

</details>

3) **Gravewalker Leggings**(leggings artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Gravewalker Leggings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84614e04dc7b79606e5ca5922cf3e7d6733decda_0.webp)

Obtained by killing a witch.
Player gets 2 seconds of regeneration effect on killing a mob, and 2 seconds of slowness on getting hit by a mob

</details>

4) **Rotstep Treads**(boot artifact)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Rotstep treads](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97ebdc00a5b321646893a3c801a17b79cb367f0a_0.webp)

Obtained by killing a skeleton.
Allows player to walk/run on soul sand with approx nomral speed.

</details>

5) **Smelting Guantlet***hand artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Smelting gauntlet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f15999d132362dd6c38a18cd7205c8463b30655.jpeg)

Can be found in a village chest.
Drops smelted ores instead of raw ores.

</details>

6) **Mining core**(hand artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Mining core](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/408959f3531b6c4a2bb213c98162979a6d4df6ff_0.webp)

Can be found in a mineshaft chest.
Gives player haste 1, and a small percent chance to drop a random smelted ore while mining a ore.

</details>

7) **Heartstone Pendant**(chestplate artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Heartstone pendant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87e5acb8fdd450386aff0452f816fa03f730e64b_0.webp)

Obtained by killing an iron golem.
Gives player resistance effect when at less than or equal 3 hearts.

</details>

NOTE: Set Bounus is received if mining core and heartstone pendant are equipped together, gives better effects.

---

## Tier 2 Artifacts

1) **Infernal Sustenance**(helmet artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![infernal sustenance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/381412c73f5422d49cfd8a9895baaaf29b58cfe5_0.webp)

Can be found in a nether fortress chest.
Gives player +1 hunger point every 15 seconds.

</details>

2) **Venomward Carapace**(chesplate artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![venomward carapace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/560dfc132641e9ce3da28345fc5b94219814bc56_0.webp)

Obtained by killing a cave spider.
Gives player poison immunity.

</details>

3) **Sanguine claw**(hand artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![sanguine claw](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55bbe5ad7fdb1cd09effda4ba66b11f699dedaa0_0.webp)

Can be found in a nether fortress chest.
Restore 0.5 heart per hit to a mob.

</details>

4) **Springroots**(leggings artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![springroots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0d4aff31510a901b40efc1b7dbf80751dc997cf_0.webp)

Obtained by killing a frog.
Gives player jump boost effect.

</details>

5) **Voidstride boots**(boot artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![voidstride boot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ca176db342dadf6e3e1b6e6c312ca7136d0ffb3_0.webp)

Obtained by killing an enderman.
Gives player speed boost effect.

</details>

6) **Molten bastion**(chestplate artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![molten bastion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97d150204b01338d51f2108fdf01ea8e63199ec2_0.webp)

Obtained by killing a magma cube.
Gives player 50% damage reduction from any source of fire/burn.

</details>

7) **Bruteforce grasp**(hand artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![bruteforce grasp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e791055dc8ddfb49492237d9c756c088d8a57c0_0.webp)

Obtained by killing a hoglin.
Gives player more knockback to every melee attacks.

</details>

8) **Ashwalker greaves**(boot artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![ashwalker greaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7d5327abc9544f1796f27dd485c70fd3ba2fcef_0.webp)

Obtained by killing a creeper.
Gives player aboloty to walk on powdered snow and magma blocks.

</details>

9) **Sporebound mantle**(leggings artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Sporebound mantle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9184e81011db6ebe7b8b4bef6c3b01a2a1fc5a88_0.webp)

Obtained by killing a withered skeleton.
Gives player immunity to wither effect and gives +1 hunger every 20 seconds at night time.

</details>

10) **Venombound gauntlet**(hand artifact)
    
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![venombound gauntlet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea1e60517a059c257b7bc2309d596cc4cbb7d51a_0.webp)

Can be found in a shipwreck chest.
Gives player to affect poison damage to mob on every hit.

</details>

11) **Cinderfest relic**(hand artifact)
    
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![cinderfest relic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e6d34d1785bf2ab9da2b87b6d2fa359645dec48.jpeg)

Obtained by killing a piglin.
Gives player to affect fire damage to mob on hit.

</details>

NOTE: Set bonus is received by equipping Venombound gauntlet and Cinderfest relic(also appies slowness on hit)

---

## Tier 3 Artifacts

1) **Tidebound Scale**(helmet artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![tidebound scale](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8315c9faabde9c40ccddeb699588ebb068958e8_0.webp)

Obtained by killing a gaurdian or an elder guardian.
Gives player dolphin's grace and immunity to mining fatigue.

</details>

2) **Levity Shell Boots**(boot artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![levity shell boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7d79080a10d96ab188d075b9a5fc8db459e8055_0.webp)

Obtained by killing a shulker.
Gives player slow falling effect.

</details>

3) **Witherheart Aegis**(chestplate artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![witherheart aegis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/017524cf8909332806b0e2fe2be1fd95d8125f36_0.webp)

Obtained by killing the wither boss.
Gives player resistance, regenration and absorption if player has less than or equal to 2 hearts.

</details>

4) **Duality of the End**(hand artifact)

  a) Good version
     
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Duality good](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f781160beef32099d7793426bc0b7cd40970e2b2_0.webp)

    Obtained by killing an ender dragon.
    Gives player random basic buff every 10 seconds for a total of 10 seconds.

</details>


  b) Evil version

  
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![duality evil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab15918dbdc98359623738c546f7476e45cb3f5e_0.webp)

    Obtained by killing an ender dragon.
    Gives player a good buff and a debuff every 20 seconds for a total of 15 seconds.

</details>


5) **Gilded Ravager**(leggings artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![gilded ravager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab831a28d9616c25a28be0afee1fd8431493bae2.jpeg)

Obtained by killing a piglin brute.
Gives player's 2x times XP from all sources of xp.

</details>

6) **Bastionlord Harness**(chestplate artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![bastionlord harness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48829d1e08748b1733014868461055966b6a5c74.jpeg)

Can be found in a bastion remenant chest.
Gives player regeneration and strength effects.

</details>

7) **Stormbound**(helmet artifact)
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![stormbound](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa69795adaf1ff1e2d02f2b939cb69fbe08ea25f_0.webp)

Obtained by killing the warden.
Every throw of a trident with channeling causes lightning to strike(regardless if there is a thunderstorm or not)

</details>

---

## Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) for Minecraft 1.21.4
2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Download `artifacts_relics-1.21.4.jar`
4. Place in your `mods` folder
5. Launch Minecraft!

---

## Credits

Made with Fabric for Minecraft 1.21.4
